selected_topic: Celebrities React to Monkeys' Suffering in Labs | PETA
news_angle: Celebrities respond to footage showing monkeys trapped in tiny cages during lab experiments, urging legislative action to stop animal suffering.
scene_metaphor: Hunk Mao investigates a miniature 'prison break' scene in a tiny high-tech lab cage where restless little monkeys wear tiny protest signs. Hunk Mao, dressed like a cool detective cat with a magnifying glass and reporter’s hat, pokes his head through bars of a comically oversized cage door labeled “LAB TRIALS.” Around him, tiny monkeys mime celebrity reactions with dramatic poses and tiny microphones. The lab environment is filled with satirical props — test tubes, robot arms hesitating, and a looming 'PRIMATE ACT' scroll rolled up and near unreachable on a high shelf. Background includes poster-sized walls with framed celebrity faces turned into playful woodcut-style 'heroes for animals.'
image_prompt: Square Instagram illustration featuring Hunk Mao as a clever orange tabby cat with expressive large eyes and a mischievous grin, wearing a detective hat and holding a magnifying glass. Hunk Mao stands center foreground, mid-paw pressing against oversized cartoon-style metal cage bars labeled 'LAB TRIALS.' Inside the cage midground, several tiny cartoon monkeys hold tiny protest signs and microphones, mimicking famous celebrity reactions from the article. Background shows a stylized sterile lab with comically oversized test tubes, robotic arms hesitating to reach monkeys, and a large rolled-up scroll labeled 'PRIMATE ACT' perched just out of reach on a shelf. Walls are decorated with framed woodcut-style portraits of celebrities expressing concern. The entire scene filled with layered visual easter eggs like tiny news cameras, hidden paw prints, a spilled vial labeled 'ETHICS,' catnip plants ironically unused, and a cheeky little mouse reporter scribbling notes below. Use high-energy dynamic poses for Hunk Mao and monkeys, with bright, warm orange tabby colors spot-lit against cooler sterile blue lab tones. REQUIRED TEXT: 'LAB TRIALS' on cage bars, 'PRIMATE ACT' on scroll.
easter_eggs: Mouse reporter scribbling notes with a tiny pencil
Spilled vial labeled 'ETHICS' on the floor
A hidden catnip plant under the lab table
Tiny cameras filming the monkeys’ protest
Paw prints leading to the cage from an unseen cat
Robot arms hesitating to touch the monkeys
Framed woodcut-style celebrity portraits on wall showing concern
A tiny scattered stack of 'PETA' leaflets on a lab bench
A small calendar page showing a day circled with tiny monkey doodles
caption: Celebrities are sounding the alarm on monkeys trapped in tiny lab cages, pushing hard for the PRIMATE Act to stop the cruelty. Meow, even I know those monkeys deserve better gigs than lab life—time for a paw-sitive change!
risk_notes: News article lacks explicit publish date; freshness assumed under 48 hours based on source data. Visual metaphor carefully ties to real event to avoid confusing the topic. No political caricatures or financial advice included.
